title: Tackling knives and serious youth violence programme guidance report
body: "This report is a compilation of good practice examples and case studies from across the areas participating in the tackling knives and serious youth violence programme, during 2010-11.  Date: Thu Mar 31 15:39:32 BST 2011  Full Document   Tackling knives and serious youth violence programme guidance report (PDF file - 1mb - Warning: large file)  "
